name: Simo
subtitle: El Asesino del Perreo
description: Muay Thai fighter engulfed in green flames. Muscular build with traditional Muay Thai shorts and hand wraps, both fists ablaze with emerald fire. Dark skin, shaved head with a green bandana, black combat tape on shins. Fighting stance with raised knee, radiating intense heat.

dialogs.intro: Prende la pista que voy a perrear sobre tu derrota.
dialogs.victory: Eso fue un nocaut al ritmo del dembow!
dialogs.defeat: Me apagaron... la llama verde... y el parlante.

name: Jecat
subtitle: La Gluten Killer
description: Agile catwoman fighter in a sleek pink and black bodysuit with cat ears and a long tail. Glitter particles float around her clawed gloves. Sharp feline eyes with pink eyeliner, short dark hair, playful yet deadly stance. Sparkling trails follow her movements.

dialogs.intro: Miau... prepara tus ultimas palabras, mi amor.
dialogs.victory: Brillitos en tu tumba! De nada!
dialogs.defeat: Gluten... me debilito... necesito mi snack...

name: Chicha
subtitle: El Demoledor
description: Dark mage brujo in a tattered red and black robe with arcane symbols glowing crimson. Skull necklace, shadowy aura swirling around his hands, deep-set glowing red eyes, wild dark hair, ritualistic face paint. Dark energy crackles between his fingers.

dialogs.intro: Los espiritus me piden sangre... y yo obedezco.
dialogs.victory: Demolido! Como todo lo que toco!
dialogs.defeat: El ritual... fallo... necesito mas velas...

name: Cata
subtitle: La Fantastica
description: Invisible phantom warrior woman in a shimmering all-pink suit that phases in and out of visibility. Translucent silhouette with glowing pink outlines, afterimage trails when she moves. Bright eyes visible through a fading face, confident stance. Particles of light scatter as parts of her body flicker between visible and invisible.

dialogs.intro: Estoy aqui... o estoy alla? Nunca lo sabras.
dialogs.victory: No puedes ganarle a lo que no puedes ver!

name: Carito
subtitle: La Bruja del Guaro
description: Powerful chaos sorceress in a long crimson and purple coat with arcane rune patterns and a flowing dark cape. Golden elegant tiara with a glowing red gem. Wild curly hair flowing with red chaos magic energy, hands wreathed in swirling purple and crimson hex orbs. Holds a bottle of guaro that radiates magical smoke. Confident powerful stance, hexagonal reality-warping energy crackles around her fingers.

dialogs.intro: Un traguito de guaro y te hechizo para siempre!
dialogs.victory: Salud! Otro que cayo bajo mi embrujo!
dialogs.defeat: Se me acabo... el guaro... y la magia...

name: Mao
subtitle: El Sapoperro
description: Elite sniper-archer hybrid in a pink and black tactical suit. Wears a high-tech visor over one eye, carries a futuristic compound bow with glowing pink energy arrows. Lean athletic build, short spiky hair, calm focused expression. Quiver on back with various trick arrows.

dialogs.intro: Estas en la mira. No te muevas... ah, da igual.
dialogs.defeat: Me quede... sin flechas... y sin dignidad.

name: Peks
subtitle: La Que Sabe
description: Mystical oracle woman floating slightly above the ground, wearing a flowing blue robe with orange and lilac cosmic patterns. Third eye glowing on her forehead, SHORT cropped silver hair above the shoulders, crystal orb floating between her hands. Serene expression, arcane circles orbit around her. Her special power summons magical silver hair tendrils that ensnare opponents.

dialogs.intro: Ya se como termina esto. Y no te va a gustar.
dialogs.victory: Lo vi venir. Literalmente. Soy oraculo.
dialogs.defeat: Esto no estaba... en ninguna vision... que raro.

name: LinaPcmn
subtitle: La Elfa
description: Graceful elf sorceress in a flowing dark navy blue robe with elegant silver runes and midnight blue accents. Long pointed ears, flowing dark hair with midnight blue streaks, sharp elven features. Glowing arcane tattoos on her arms, silver and midnight blue magical orbs float around her hands, ethereal magic circles orbit her, mystical energy radiates from her fingertips.

dialogs.intro: Los elfos no perdemos. Es cuestion de elegancia.
dialogs.victory: Mil anos de entrenamiento le ganan a tus punos.
dialogs.defeat: Imposible... un elfo... derrotado... que deshonra.

name: Alv
subtitle: The Grandson
description: Scorpion-inspired fighter in orange and red ninja outfit with a fierce skull mask. Rope kunai weapon attached to his arm, blazing Ferrari-red eyes behind the mask. Athletic muscular build, tattered orange hood, chains wrapped around forearms. Hellfire aura flickers around him.

dialogs.victory: Fatality! Bueno, casi. No me demanden.
dialogs.defeat: El nieto... cayo... pero el abuelo viene...

name: Sun
subtitle: La Millonaria Faquera
description: Fierce street fighter woman with an aquamarine and navy blue outfit, wielding a gleaming combat knife in each hand. River Plate jersey torn into a battle crop top, bandana covering half her face, intense eyes, scars on arms. Streetwise stance, blades glinting with aquamarine light.

dialogs.intro: Millonaria de cuna, faquera de corazon. A ver si aguantas.
dialogs.victory: Te destriparon las facas! Dale campeon!
dialogs.defeat: La millonaria... necesita un descanso... nada mas.

name: Panchito
subtitle: El Palido
description: Stealth ninja in dark blue and black tactical gear, ghostly pale skin that seems to fade into shadows. Face wrapped in dark cloth leaving only piercing blue eyes visible, silent and deadly stance. Smoke bombs on belt, tanto blade in reverse grip, barely visible in the darkness.

dialogs.intro: No me viste llegar. No me vas a ver irme.
dialogs.victory: Desaparezco antes de que caigas al suelo.

name: Ric
subtitle: El Errante
description: Blazing fire ram warrior in dark hunter green and deep olive armor with massive curved ram horns wreathed in flames. Thick muscular build, hooved boots, wild fiery mane, glowing ember eyes. Charges forward with horns lowered, trails of dark green fire follow his movements.

dialogs.intro: El carnero igneo no pregunta. Embiste.
dialogs.victory: Arrollado! Asi se siente el fuego verde!
dialogs.defeat: El errante... descansa... pero nunca se detiene.

name: Camilo
subtitle: El Quemon
description: Fire pirate captain in a black coat with red flame patterns, burning cutlass in one hand, hook hand wreathed in fire on the other. Pirate hat with a flaming skull emblem, eyepatch, wicked grin, smoke rising from his shoulders. Charred boots on a burning deck.

dialogs.intro: Arrr! Prepara tu alma, que la voy a quemar!
dialogs.victory: Todo arde cuando El Quemon llega a puerto!
dialogs.defeat: Me apagaron... el fuego... necesito ron...

name: Migue
subtitle: El Capi Tripaseca
description: Captain America-inspired super soldier in a black and blue tactical suit with a star emblem on the chest. Carries a round vibranium-style shield with blue and black rings, strong jaw, determined expression, short military haircut. Heroic stance, shield raised and ready.

dialogs.intro: Puedo hacer esto todo el dia. En serio. Todo el dia.
dialogs.victory: Mision cumplida, soldado. Descansa en paz.
dialogs.defeat: El Capi... cae... pero se levanta... siempre...

name: Bozz
subtitle: El Pulpo
description: Elastic octopus-themed brawler in a dark purple and black suit with tentacle-like stretchy arms. Lean wiry build, deep purple aura, suction-cup patterns on his gloves and boots. Wild messy hair, mischievous grin, arms extending unnaturally long in a fighting stance.

dialogs.intro: Ocho brazos y todos te van a pegar.
dialogs.victory: Te envolvi como calamar! Tinta y todo!
dialogs.defeat: Me secaron... los tentaculos... necesito agua...

name: Angy
subtitle: The Mystic Arrow
description: Mystic archer in light blue and silver armor with a flowing cape. Long golden hair, piercing blue eyes, elegant compound bow that fires glowing magical arrows. Athletic build, confident stance, arrows of light shimmer in her quiver.

dialogs.intro: Mi arco no falla. Vos si.
dialogs.defeat: Se me acabaron... las flechas magicas...
